title: Flowers
alt: This is actually pencil on paper, just inverted and colored
transcript: [A sketch of flowers, drawn in green, red, and yellow on a black background.]
explanation: This is a drawing of flowers made by Randall. According to the title text and the original caption on the LiveJournal post, he originally drew the flowers with a pencil on a white sheet of paper. Then, he used the invert feature of a photo-editing program to reverse it from black-on-white to white-on-black and colored to the flowers. The image below gives a good approximation of what the original drawing might have looked like. He also says the flowers are based on his imagination and are probably not a real species.
